name: kol-app
description: Release metadata + changelog automation for the Kol macOS app.

scripts.eval:code: cd evals && npx promptfoo@latest eval --prompts prompts/english-code.txt --tests datasets/code-dictation.yaml --filter-pattern 'Keyword|Operator|Full type|Variable|Interface|Switch|No capitalize|TS:|Python:|PascalCase|camelCase|Keywords stay'
scripts.eval:screen: cd evals && npx promptfoo@latest eval --prompts prompts/english-code-screen.txt --tests datasets/code-dictation.yaml --filter-pattern 'Screen context'
